The command was "bin/prover9 -f tests/fixtures/inputs/lattice_absorption.in".

============================== INPUT =================================

% Reading from file tests/fixtures/inputs/lattice_absorption.in


formulas(sos).
x ^ y = y ^ x.
x v y = y v x.
(x ^ y) ^ z = x ^ (y ^ z).
(x v y) v z = x v (y v z).
x ^ (x v y) = x.
x v (x ^ y) = x.
end_of_list.

formulas(goals).
x ^ x = x.
end_of_list.

============================== end of input ==========================

% Formulas that are not ordinary clauses:

============================== end of process non-clausal formulas ===

% Clauses before input processing:

formulas(usable).
end_of_list.

formulas(sos).
x ^ y = y ^ x.  [assumption].
x v y = y v x.  [assumption].
(x ^ y) ^ z = x ^ (y ^ z).  [assumption].
(x v y) v z = x v (y v z).  [assumption].
x ^ (x v y) = x.  [assumption].
x v (x ^ y) = x.  [assumption].
c1 ^ c1 != c1.  [deny(1)].
end_of_list.

formulas(demodulators).
end_of_list.

No predicates eliminated.

Auto_inference settings:
  % set(paramodulation).  % (positive equality literals)

Auto_process settings:  (no changes).


% Operation ^ is commutative; C redundancy checks enabled.
kept:      2 x ^ y = y ^ x.  [assumption].

% Operation v is commutative; C redundancy checks enabled.
kept:      3 x v y = y v x.  [assumption].
kept:      4 (x ^ y) ^ z = x ^ (y ^ z).  [assumption].
kept:      5 (x v y) v z = x v (y v z).  [assumption].
kept:      6 x ^ (x v y) = x.  [assumption].
kept:      7 x v (x ^ y) = x.  [assumption].
kept:      8 c1 ^ c1 != c1.  [deny(1)].

formulas(usable).

        % (lex-dep)

5 (x v y) v z = x v (y v z).  [assumption].

============================== SEARCH ================================

% Starting search at 0.00 seconds.

given #1 (I,wt=7): 2 x ^ y = y ^ x.  [assumption].

given #2 (I,wt=7): 3 x v y = y v x.  [assumption].

given #3 (I,wt=11): 4 (x ^ y) ^ z = x ^ (y ^ z).  [assumption].

% Operation ^ is associative-commutative; CAC redundancy checks enabled.
% back CAC tautology: 9 x ^ (y ^ z) = z ^ (x ^ y).  [para(4(a,1),2(a,1))].

given #4 (I,wt=11): 5 (x v y) v z = x v (y v z).  [assumption].

% Operation v is associative-commutative; CAC redundancy checks enabled.
% back CAC tautology: 11 x v (y v z) = z v (x v y).  [para(5(a,1),3(a,1))].

given #5 (I,wt=7): 6 x ^ (x v y) = x.  [assumption].

given #6 (I,wt=7): 7 x v (x ^ y) = x.  [assumption].
-------- Proof 1 -------- 

============================== PROOF =================================

% Proof 1 at 0.00 (+ 0.00) seconds.
% Length of proof is 6.
% Level of proof is 2.
% Maximum clause weight is 7.000.
% Given clauses 6 (3.000 givens/level).

1 x ^ x = x # label(non_clause) # label(goal).  [goal].
6 x ^ (x v y) = x.  [assumption].
7 x v (x ^ y) = x.  [assumption].
8 c1 ^ c1 != c1.  [deny(1)].
21 x ^ x = x.  [para(7(a,1),6(a,1,2))].
22 $F.  [resolve(21,a,8,a)].

============================== end of proof ==========================
